items.title: Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

head.pred:
Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk
Market Risk
We are exposed to various market risks, including interest rate risk, foreign currency exchange
rate risk, and commodity price risk. Our exposure to these risks is managed through various
financial instruments, including derivatives.
